title: tectaria decastroi
intro: Tectaria decastroi, also known as Decastro's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tectaria decastroi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used to treat a range of ailments.
